tagline: Pay with anything. Receive USDC. Invisibly.

overview.flow: Customer pays any token on BSC → AIG swaps to USDC → bridges to Arc Network → merchant receives USDC
overview.uxPromise: Invisible: customer never sees swap/bridge mechanics

SwapRouter.sol.entryFn: swapAndBridge(sessionId, grossUSDC, aigFee, amountInMax, poolFee, merchantBytes32, merchantAddr)

apiRoutes.POST /api/agent/quote: fetch spot price → calc swap params (0.5% slippage + 0.1% AIG fee) → cache to Supabase → return SwapParams
apiRoutes.POST /api/agent/execute: SSE stream: swap_executing → bridging → confirmed (or bridge_delayed)

libModules.lib/agent.ts: fetchSpotPrice (PancakeSwap Quoter), calculateSwapParams, updateSessionStatus (Supabase upsert + JSONB cache)
libModules.lib/chains.ts: getArcChain() — viem defineChain Arc Testnet ID 212
libModules.lib/cctp.ts: extractMessageHash, extractRawMessage, receiveMessage (Arc MessageTransmitter), pollAttestation (Circle API)

pages./pay/[id]: Customer payment page — wagmi connect, fee breakdown, SSE progress, mobile-first
pages./dashboard: Merchant dashboard — Pencil UI, QR generator, real-time payment feed, points tier, stat cards

tables.payment_sessions: session_id (unique), status, bridge_mode, merchant_wallet, customer_wallet, target_usdc, swap_params (JSONB)

external.Circle CCTP: Domain 7 (Arc) — TokenMessenger.depositForBurn → MessageTransmitter.receiveMessage; attestation via Circle API
external.Arc Network: Settlement chain (chain ID 212) — USDC mint destination

CCTP (primary).flow: BSC SwapCompleted → extract MessageSent log → keccak256 hash → poll Circle attestation (5s interval, 120s timeout) → Arc MessageTransmitter.receiveMessage(message, attestation) → USDC mint

ADMIN_RELAY (fallback).gate: smoke test FAIL or dev mode
ADMIN_RELAY (fallback).flow: BSC SwapCompleted → poll receipt 30s → Supabase atomic guard (status=PENDING) → admin wallet USDC.transfer on Arc

paymentExecution: Backend: load cached swap_params, emit swap_executing
CCTP: extractMessageHash → pollAttestation → receiveMessage on Arc
ADMIN_RELAY: adminRelay(merchant, netUSDC, sessionId) — atomic guard

keyDesignDecisions.BRIDGE_MODE_abstraction: Graceful fallback CCTP↔ADMIN_RELAY without code change — env var at deploy
keyDesignDecisions.atomicIdempotency: Supabase .eq('status','PENDING') prevents duplicate transfers on retry
keyDesignDecisions.quoteCaching: swap_params JSONB cache → /execute uses cached values (no recalculation drift)
keyDesignDecisions.offChainMath: All floating-point in TypeScript (lib/agent.ts) — Solidity sees only integer wei
keyDesignDecisions.clientSideOnly: Payment + dashboard pages are 'use client' — wagmi needs browser env

security.auth: Wallet-based identity (Phase 1 PoC, no auth system)
